common.uiScaffold: UI scaffold only. Business logic is intentionally deferred to the next step.
common.searchPlaceholder: Search credentials, systems, users, or tags

lock.title: Unlock your team vault
lock.subtitle: Access shared credentials for cloud tools, client portals, and internal systems in one trusted workspace.
lock.helper: Unlock flow is currently scaffolded. Encryption and session state are connected in the next implementation step.
lock.scaffoldNote: Vault opening, session handshake, and cryptographic key handling are intentionally not implemented yet in this stage.

trustItems.audit: Audit-ready event model for security timeline
trustItems.speed: Fast access model with lock-first posture

vault.title: Vault Overview
vault.subtitle: Daily workspace for operations and admin teams managing shared credentials.
vault.credentialsEmptyTitle: Your vault is ready for the first credential
vault.credentialsEmptyDescription: Start by adding one shared account, then organize access with tags by department or project.

insights.title: Security Health / Vault Insights
insights.subtitle: Prepared for reused password, weak password, missing URL, and stale credential analytics.

vaultNew.title: Add Credential
vaultNew.subtitle: Create a structured credential prepared for encryption and lifecycle controls.

securityPanelItems.noPlainText: No plain-text password rendering in list views
